description_long: This is a rustic wooden crate with a rectangular shape, constructed from light-colored, weathered wood planks. The front panel features a painted illustration of two peaches with green leaves and the word 'Peaches' written below, suggesting it is used for fruit storage or display. The crate is reinforced at the corners with visible metal fasteners, giving it a sturdy and durable appearance. The top is open, allowing easy access to the interior, which is empty and spacious. The wood grain texture is prominent on all sides, and the crate has a matte, slightly rough finish. This type of crate is commonly found in urban markets, grocery stores, or street vendor setups.
description: A rustic, light wood crate with a painted 'Peaches' label and open top, reinforced by metal fasteners and featuring a weathered, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view of the crate showing plain wood planks and metal fasteners, with no visible label or artwork.
description_view_1: Another plain side of the crate, similar to view 0, with visible wood grain and metal fasteners.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the painted peaches illustration and 'Peaches' text, making this the most visually distinctive side.
description_view_3: Back view of the crate, showing only the wood planks and fasteners, with no artwork or text.
